fishbite.config.title: MCLabs Addons
fishbite.config.enabled.tooltip: Show the exclamation mark above your fishing bobber.
fishbite.config.scale.tooltip: Size of the exclamation mark (100% = default size).
fishbite.config.waiting_color.tooltip: Marker color while waiting for a fish.
fishbite.config.bite_color.tooltip: Marker color while a fish is ready to be reeled in.
fishbite.config.mute_others.tooltip: Silence cast, splash, and reel sounds from bobbers that are not yours.
fishbite.config.catch_sound.tooltip: Sound played when a fish bites your bobber, replacing the vanilla splash. Leave as vanilla to keep the default.
fishbite.config.hud.enabled.tooltip: Show this widget on screen when active.
fishbite.config.hud.background.tooltip: Draw a rounded background behind this widget.
fishbite.config.hud.background_color.too: Background color; the alpha channel controls transparency.
fishbite.hud.editor.title: HUD Studio
fishbite.hud.editor.hint: Click to select · drag to move · drag the edges to resize · arrows nudge
fishbite.hud.chum_timer.name: Chum Timer
fishbite.hud.editor.reset_all.tooltip: Restore every widget to its default position, size, and colours.
fishbite.hud.editor.grid.tooltip: Show an alignment grid and snap to it.
fishbite.hud.editor.snap.tooltip: Snap to edges, centre, and other widgets while dragging (hold Alt to bypass).
fishbite.hud.editor.nudge_hint: Arrow keys move · Shift = 10px · Alt = free drag
fishbite.hud.editor.multi_hint: %s widgets selected · drag any to move them together
fishbite.hud.booster_timer.name: Booster Timer
fishbite.hud.mini_event.name: Mini-Event
fishbite.hud.pit.name: The Pit
fishbite.hud.lab_wars.name: Lab Wars Boosters
fishbite.hud.pit_timer.name: The Pit
fishbite.hud.rental_mount.name: Rental Mount
fishbite.hud.personal_boosters.name: Personal Boosters
fishbite.hud.bounty.name: Bounties
fishbite.hud.dailies.name: Dailies
fishbite.hud.votes.name: Vote Reminder
